title: QOL Mega Showdown Recipes
description: This datapack adds recipes to a lot of unobtainable items from the mega showdown mod and adds recipes for the gimmick items so they are super limited items.
body:
This datapack adds recipes to a lot of unobtainable items from the mega showdown mod and adds recipes for the gimmick items, so they are not super limited items.

Adds recipes for a lot of items. If you wish to know more, please join the Mega Showdown [Discord](https://discord.gg/3eB7Z7Pg9S) and go to this [forum](https://discord.com/channels/1334216416617824386/1457261641098989669)


Credits to "mcjohnjr" for helping maintain and update the datapack
